nasb.text: and they all, from smallest to greatest, were giving attention to him, saying, “This man is what is called the Great Power of God.”

esv.text: They all paid attention to him, from the least to the greatest, saying, “This man is the power of God that is called Great.”

cnv.text: 城裡大大小小都聽從他，說：“這就是那稱為‘　神的大能’的人。”

ccb.text: 无论贵贱，众人都听从他，称他为“上帝的大能者”。

csbs.text: 所有的人，从卑微的到尊贵的，都听从他。他们说：“这个人就是那被称为‘神的大能者’的。”
